inputs.label: Wall Height (m)
inputs.businessContext: Total height of the retaining wall from base to top.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total height of the retaining wall from base to top.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İstinat duvarının tabandan tepeye toplam yüksekliği.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur totale du mur de soutènement de la base au sommet.
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura total del muro de contención desde la base hasta la parte superior.

inputs.label: Stem Thickness (m)
inputs.businessContext: Thickness of the vertical stem at the top.

businessContext_i18n.es: Ancho de la losa de base.

inputs.label: Heel Length (m)
inputs.businessContext: Length of the heel (portion of base behind the stem).

businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur du talon (partie de la base derrière le fût).
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud del talón (parte de la base detrás del vástago).

inputs.label: Toe Length (m)
